26.reason: [Resetting j to 1 inside the loop causes infinite loop or incorrect traversal because after j increments in for-loop, it may revisit already processed segments and never terminate properly under certain inputs. Also, this approach doesn't guarantee correct chaining due to unordered segment list.]
